queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Microsoft .NET Runtime - 8.%' AND name LIKE '%(x64)' AND publisher = 'Microsoft Corporation';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name LIKE 'Microsoft .NET Runtime - 8.%' AND name LIKE '%(x64)' AND publisher = 'Microsoft Corporation' AND version_compare(version, '8.0.27') < 0);
